2606.06373.title: LatentWave: JEPA Pretraining for Wireless Foundation Models
2606.06373.paper_summary: Wireless foundation models have emerged as a promising alternative to building separate models for each wireless task. However, existing approaches rely on masked input reconstruction, which can bias representations toward low-level signal details. In this paper, we propose LatentWave, a wireless foundation model pretrained using a Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) on diverse wireless spectrograms and channel state information (CSI). By predicting masked regions in latent space, LatentWave learns representations that are more transferable out of the box across diverse downstream tasks. The proposed architecture employs per-channel patch embeddings with stochastic channel sampling during pretraining, allowing it to process variable antenna counts and improving usability across heterogeneous wireless configurations. We evaluate LatentWave on four downstream tasks: RF signal classification, 5G NR positioning, beam prediction, and LoS/NLoS classification, comparing against a masked-modeling baseline (WavesFM) pretrained on the same data. Additionally, we show that the masking geometry introduces a task-dependent inductive bias: frequency masking strongly favors channel-related tasks such as positioning and beam prediction, while region masking better preserves discriminability for signal classification.
2606.06373.paper_summary_zh: 無線基礎模型已成為為每個無線任務構建單獨模型的一個有前景的替代方案。<lb/>然而，現有的方法依賴於遮蔽輸入重建，這可能會使表示偏向於低層次的信號細節。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了LatentWave，一種使用聯合嵌入預測架構（JEPA）在多樣的無線聲譜圖和通道狀態信息（CSI）上進行預訓練的無線基礎模型。<lb/>通過預測潛在空間中的遮蔽區域，LatentWave學習到的表示在多樣的下游任務中更具可轉移性。<lb/>所提出的架構在預訓練期間採用了每通道的補丁嵌入和隨機通道抽樣，使其能夠處理可變的天線數量，並改善在異構無線配置中的可用性。<lb/>我們在四個下游任務上評估LatentWave：RF信號分類、5G NR定位、波束預測和LoS/NLoS分類，並與在相同數據上進行預訓練的遮蔽建模基線（WavesFM）進行比較。<lb/>此外，我們顯示出遮蔽幾何形狀引入了一種任務依賴的歸納偏見：頻率遮蔽強烈偏向於與通道相關的任務，如定位和波束預測，而區域遮蔽則更好地保留信號分類的可辨識性。
2606.06373.author: Ahmed Mohamed et.al.
2606.06373.authors: Ahmed Mohamed, Ahmed Aboulfotouh, Hatem Abou-Zeid
